# AmbiSprout

> AmbiSprout is India's AI-powered sustainability companion. Users complete personalized eco missions created by Sprout AI, verify real-world impact through photos, receipts, and activity data, earn Sprout Coins, and join a founding community building greener habits across Indian cities.

AmbiSprout is an early-stage product built in India for students and young professionals. Impact estimates follow published emission factors; missions are verified by AI rather than self-reported, and the platform is free for individual users.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://www.ambisprout.com/): Landing page introducing Sprout AI, missions, and the founding community
- [Features](https://www.ambisprout.com/#ai-section): AI Sustainability Coach, Carbon Footprint Calculator, AI Image Verification, and Receipt Analysis
- [Your Green Journey](https://www.ambisprout.com/#journey-section): Five-step path from meeting Sprout to inspiring the community
- [Active Challenges](https://www.ambisprout.com/#challenges-section): City-based sustainability challenges across Bengaluru, Delhi, Mumbai, Pune, and Chennai
- [Community](https://www.ambisprout.com/#community-section): Live activity, trending discussions, and member achievements

## Key Facts

- Product: AI sustainability companion (web application)
- Region: India
- Audience: Students and young professionals
- Pricing: Free for individual users
- Verification: Missions verified via photos, receipts, or activity data
- Rewards: Sprout Coins, funded by ESG-friendly brand partners

## Optional

- [Contact](https://www.ambisprout.com/#contact): Get in touch with the AmbiSprout team
